data.narrative:
Solar Foods is a public-stage biotech company in the Biotech & Health sector that has raised $160M+. Valuation analysis relies on a peer-median approach anchored to four same-sector, same-stage comparables: Tempus AI ($6.0B), Freenome ($2.6B), Recursion Pharmaceuticals ($1.8B), and Alto Neuroscience ($529M).

The peer-median method yields $2.2B, the only triangulation method applicable given the absence of disclosed revenue figures. This median reflects the mid-point of a wide $529M–$6.0B range across the comparable set, suggesting material dispersion in public biotech valuations. A public P/S approach using the sector median of 7.8x across three biotech tickers (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L) cannot be applied without Solar Foods' revenue data, which is typical for private companies.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $1.9B–$2.5B, centered on the $2.2B peer median. The wide spread among comps (from $529M to $6.0B) reflects significant uncertainty in public biotech valuations, likely driven by differences in pipeline maturity, clinical stage, and market opportunity perception. Key risks to this range include Solar Foods' specific revenue trajectory and the composition volatility of the peer set itself, given the small sample size and heterogeneity of biotech valuations at the public stage.
